Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackcurrent_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Strengthen the black current. Void energy surges through the body.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Further increases Stamina Conversion Rate and Energy.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackcurrent_lvlup2
Esoterica.Desc: The black current becomes a torrent. Energy overflows.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Stamina Conversion Rate and Energy.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackcurrent_lvlup3
Esoterica.Desc: The black current reaches its peak. Unlimited energy flows through the void.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Fundamentally increases Stamina Conversion Rate and Energy.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_abyssalcauldron_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Expand the Inner Cauldron with void energy. No condemnation can touch you.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_abyssalcauldron_lvlup2
Esoterica.Desc: The Inner Cauldron expands further. Heaven's condemnation is meaningless before the void.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_abyssalcauldron_lvlup3
Esoterica.Desc: The Inner Cauldron reaches infinite capacity. Nothing can contain this power.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidconduction_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Nourish the ignited inner Qi to unleash limitless potential. The void erases condemnation.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackmantra_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Meditate on the properties of lightning, sharpening focus and accelerating Qi circulation to the extreme.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidshield_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Extend the lightning Qi shield over the whole body. The armor of the void makes you invincible.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_abyssaltempest_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: The inner lightning Qi tempest becomes a hurricane. Qi reserves become virtually infinite.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidstep_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Move across the world in a flash and imbue spells with devastating lightning power.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Hugely increases Flying Speed in adventures.\nIncreases Spell Power.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_obliterationpill_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: This ultimate elixir forcefully expands the Inner Cauldron beyond all mortal limits.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the following elixir recipe: \nInner Cauldron Pill[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_heavenbreaker_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Harness tribulation lightning to refine the body into an indestructible vessel. Defenses become absolute.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Fundamentally increase the effectiveness of Qi Shield.\nGreatly fortify the body.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_heavenbreaker_lvlup2
Esoterica.Desc: At the pinnacle of this technique, defenses become truly indestructible. Break through all Protection limits.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Comprehend the true meaning of Protection, and break through its limits by 7 levels.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackfulmination_lvlup1
Esoterica.Desc: Merge the swift and destructive aspects of lightning. Spell Power and Magic Speed reach godly levels.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Greatly improves Spell Power.\nDecreases Spell Qi consumption.\nGreatly increases Magic Speed.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidlightning
Esoterica.Desc: A supreme pill recipe that grants total elemental immunity.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the following elixir recipe: \nFive Colors Pill[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_condensedlightning
Esoterica.Desc: The ultimate method for condensing tribulation lightning into pill form. Only the worthy may learn this — and you are worthy.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidannihilation
Esoterica.Desc: The ultimate offensive technique. Obliterate everything in your path with concentrated void lightning.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Ultimate destructive power. Annihilate all who oppose you.[/color][/size]

Desc: A method to capture the essense of tribulation lightning and refine it into a pill. Only the strongest cultivators may consume it, but it will tremendoulsy help cultivation.
